  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resource Assistant",
  "description": "Rainbow Educational Service Limited is a leading provider of innovative educational solutions. We specialize in educational consulting, teacher training, student enrichment programs, and educational resource development. We&#39;re passionate about shaping the future of education and fostering a love of learning.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resource Assistant

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary&nbsp;


	A leading Nigerian school offering a blended Nigerian and Cambridge curriculum is seeking exceptional talent.
	The organization is known for its global approach to education and commitment to nurturing well-rounded students within a high-quality learning environment, and is backed by a top-flight education management company in Nigeria.


Responsibilities&nbsp;


	Manage HR databases and sort emails for the HR department
	Post online job advertisements, shortlist candidates, and schedule job interviews
	Coordinate orientation and training sessions for new employees
	Maintain accurate records of employee attendance and process leave requests
	Ensure compliance with HR policies, procedures, and labour laws
	Update and maintain personnel files and HR records accurately and confidentially
	Assist with payroll preparation by providing relevant employee information (e.g., absences, bonuses, leaves)
	Participate in employee engagement activities and events.


Requirements


	B.Sc. or HND in a relevant field
	1&ndash;2 years of work experience in an HR-related role
	Excellent organisational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail
	Proficiency in MS Word and Excel (other MS Office applications are an added advantage).

Human Resource Assistant Job at Rainbow Educational Service Limited




        
    

        
        Rainbow Educational Service Limited is a leading provider of innovative educational solutions. We specialize in educational consulting, teacher training, student enrichment programs, and educational resource development. We're passionate about shaping the future of education and fostering a love of learning.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resource Assistant

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A leading Nigerian school offering a blended Nigerian and Cambridge curriculum is seeking exceptional talent.
	The organization is known for its global approach to education and commitment to nurturing well-rounded students within a high-quality learning environment, and is backed by a top-flight education management company in Nigeria.


Responsibilities 


	Manage HR databases and sort emails for the HR department
	Post online job advertisements, shortlist candidates, and schedule job interviews
	Coordinate orientation and training sessions for new employees
	Maintain accurate records of employee attendance and process leave requests
	Ensure compliance with HR policies, procedures, and labour laws
	Update and maintain personnel files and HR records accurately and confidentially
	Assist with payroll preparation by providing relevant employee information (e.g., absences, bonuses, leaves)
	Participate in employee engagement activities and events.


Requirements


	B.Sc. or HND in a relevant field
	1–2 years of work experience in an HR-related role
	Excellent organisational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail
	Proficiency in MS Word and Excel (other MS Office applications are an added advantage).
    

    

        Click here to Apply
